query:
update tml_switchboard.jobs
        set job_state = 'finalized',
            termination_reason = 'host_dropped_job',
            task_exit_status = null,
            dispatched_on_host_id = null,
            started_at = null,
            initializing_stage = null,
            terminated_at = $2
        where job_id = $1 and job_state <> 'finalized'
        returning job_id
